approvalSource: Steve approved Plan D in chat after reviewer scored SHEETS-QUOTA-HARDENING-001 at 9.8/10.
notes: Approval covers Sheets quota hardening: read-only cache for Sheets GET calls, writes never cached, errors never cached as healthy data, batchGet helper, Runtime Health visibility, quota request checklist, verifier coverage, process gates, and no source-contract or business-data changes.
